revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀の芸術|8|08}} {{Commonscat}} [[8世紀]]の[[芸術]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:8せいきのけいしゆつ}} […」

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:8世紀の芸術]] [[ar:Category:الفنون في القرن 8]] [[bn:Category:৮ম শতাব্দীর শিল্পকলা]] [[cy:Category:Y celfyddydau yn yr 8fed ganrif]] [[eo:Category:8-a jarcento en arto]] [[fa:Category:فعالیت‌های هنری در سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:8-րդ դարն արվեստում]] [[ka:Category:VIII საუკუნე ხელოვნებაში]] [[ko:Category:8세기 예술]] [[ku:Category:Sedsala 8an di hunerê de]] [[no:Category:Kunst og kultur på 700-tallet]] [[ru:Category:Искусство VIII века]] [[sv:Category:Konst under 700-talet]] [[uk:Category:Мистецтво VIII століття]] [[vi:Category:Nghệ thuật thế kỷ 8]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:8th-century_works]].

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀の芸術|8|08}} {{Commons cat multi|8th-century art}} [[8世紀]]の[[芸術]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:8th century in the arts}}
{{デフォルトソート:8せいきのけいしゆつ}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:8世紀の芸術]]|version=76701801}} [[ja:Category:8世紀の芸術]]
==Old Content==
(2025-05-15T23:17:45Z): (Bot: update category metadata)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:8th-century_works]].
[[ja:Category:8世紀の芸術]] [[ar:Category:الفنون في القرن 8]] [[bn:Category:৮ম শতাব্দীর শিল্পকলা]] [[cy:Category:Y celfyddydau yn yr 8fed ganrif]] [[eo:Category:8-a jarcento en arto]] [[fa:Category:فعالیت‌های هنری در سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:8-րդ դարն արվեստում]] [[ka:Category:VIII საუკუნე ხელოვნებაში]] [[ko:Category:8세기 예술]] [[ku:Category:Sedsala 8an di hunerê de]] [[no:Category:Kunst og kultur på 700-tallet]] [[ru:Category:Искусство VIII века]] [[sv:Category:Konst under 700-talet]] [[uk:Category:Мистецтво VIII століття]] [[vi:Category:Nghệ thuật thế kỷ 8]] [[en:Category:8th century in the arts]] [[en:Category:8th century in the arts]] {{translated page|ja|Category:8世紀の芸術|version=76701801|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:8th-century_works]].
[[ja:Category:8世紀の芸術]] [[ar:Category:الفنون في القرن 8]] [[bn:Category:৮ম শতাব্দীর শিল্পকলা]] [[cy:Category:Y celfyddydau yn yr 8fed ganrif]] [[eo:Category:8-a jarcento en arto]] [[fa:Category:فعالیت‌های هنری در سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:8-րդ դարն արվեստում]] [[ka:Category:VIII საუკუნე ხელოვნებაში]] [[ko:Category:8세기 예술]] [[ku:Category:Sedsala 8an di hunerê de]] [[no:Category:Kunst og kultur på 700-tallet]] [[ru:Category:Искусство VIII века]] [[sv:Category:Konst under 700-talet]] [[uk:Category:Мистецтво VIII століття]] [[vi:Category:Nghệ thuật thế kỷ 8]] [[en:Category:8th century in the arts]] [[en:Category:8th century in the arts]] {{translated page|ja|Category:8世紀の芸術|version=76701801|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"

revision.text:
{{Portal|Arts}} This [[Help:Category|category]] is for the '''[[8th century]]''' in '''[[the arts]]'''.
{{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:8th century|Arts]] [[Category:Arts by century|08]] [[Category:1st millennium in the arts]]
[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:Category:8th century in the arts]] [[en:Category:8th century in the arts]] [[en:Category:8th century in the arts]]

{{Portal|Arts}} This [[Help:Category|category]] is for the '''[[8th century]]''' in '''[[the arts]]'''.
{{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
